error_signature: nested loop not iterating correctly after first execution
title: Nested loop fails to iterate after first execution
symptom: The nested loop processes employees correctly for the first period but skips iterations for subsequent periods, jumping directly to the 'done' branch.
applies_when: Using nested loops in a workflow
not_this_if: Only a single loop is used
root_cause: The loop node in n8n may not reset its state properly when the input is derived from the previous node, causing it to skip iterations in subsequent executions.
fix_steps: Enable the option to reset the loop node when the input is from the previous node
agent_instruction: Reset the loop node when the input is from the previous node and save the workflow.
